stench.name: Stench
stench.desc: The stench may cause the target to flinch when the Pokemon deals damage.

drizzle.name: Drizzle
drizzle.desc: The Pokemon summons rain when it enters battle.

speed_boost.name: Speed Boost
speed_boost.desc: The Pokemon's Speed stat is boosted at the end of each turn.

battle_armor.name: Battle Armor
battle_armor.desc: Hard armor protects the Pokemon from critical hits.

sturdy.name: Sturdy
sturdy.desc: The Pokemon cannot be knocked out in one hit from full HP. Also immune to OHKO moves.

damp.name: Damp
damp.desc: Prevents the use of explosive moves like Self-Destruct by dampening surroundings.

limber.name: Limber
limber.desc: The Pokemon's limber body prevents it from being paralyzed.

sand_veil.name: Sand Veil
sand_veil.desc: Boosts the Pokemon's evasiveness in a sandstorm. Immune to sandstorm damage.

static.name: Static
static.desc: The Pokemon may paralyze an attacker that makes direct contact.

volt_absorb.name: Volt Absorb
volt_absorb.desc: Restores HP if hit by an Electric-type move instead of taking damage.

water_absorb.name: Water Absorb
water_absorb.desc: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move instead of taking damage.

oblivious.name: Oblivious
oblivious.desc: The Pokemon is oblivious, preventing Attract, Taunt, and Intimidate.

cloud_nine.name: Cloud Nine
cloud_nine.desc: Eliminates the effects of weather on the battlefield.

compound_eyes.name: Compound Eyes
compound_eyes.desc: The Pokemon's compound eyes boost its accuracy by 30%.

insomnia.name: Insomnia
insomnia.desc: The Pokemon's insomnia prevents it from falling asleep.

color_change.name: Color Change
color_change.desc: The Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move that hit it.

immunity.name: Immunity
immunity.desc: The Pokemon's immune system prevents it from being poisoned.

flash_fire.name: Flash Fire
flash_fire.desc: Powers up the Pokemon's Fire-type moves if hit by a Fire-type move. Immune to Fire.

shield_dust.name: Shield Dust
shield_dust.desc: Blocks the additional effects of moves taken.

own_tempo.name: Own Tempo
own_tempo.desc: The Pokemon cannot become confused. Also prevents Intimidate.

suction_cups.name: Suction Cups
suction_cups.desc: The Pokemon uses suction cups to stay in place, preventing forced switching.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.desc: Lowers the opposing Pokemon's Attack stat when it enters battle.

shadow_tag.name: Shadow Tag
shadow_tag.desc: Prevents opposing Pokemon from fleeing or switching out.

rough_skin.name: Rough Skin
rough_skin.desc: The Pokemon's rough skin damages attackers that make direct contact.

wonder_guard.name: Wonder Guard
wonder_guard.desc: Only super-effective moves can damage this Pokemon.

levitate.name: Levitate
levitate.desc: The Pokemon floats, making it immune to Ground-type moves.

effect_spore.name: Effect Spore
effect_spore.desc: May inflict poison, paralysis, or sleep on contact.

synchronize.name: Synchronize
synchronize.desc: Passes poison, paralysis, or burn to the Pokemon that inflicted it.

clear_body.name: Clear Body
clear_body.desc: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering its stats.

natural_cure.name: Natural Cure
natural_cure.desc: All status conditions are healed when the Pokemon switches out.

lightning_rod.name: Lightning Rod
lightning_rod.desc: Draws Electric-type moves to this Pokemon and boosts Sp. Atk. Immune to Electric.

serene_grace.name: Serene Grace
serene_grace.desc: Doubles the likelihood of additional effects occurring when attacking.

swift_swim.name: Swift Swim
swift_swim.desc: Doubles the Pokemon's Speed stat in rain.

chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
chlorophyll.desc: Doubles the Pokemon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

illuminate.name: Illuminate
illuminate.desc: Raises the likelihood of meeting wild Pokemon. No battle effect.

trace.name: Trace
trace.desc: Copies the opposing Pokemon's ability when entering battle.

poison_point.name: Poison Point
poison_point.desc: May poison an attacker that makes direct contact.

inner_focus.name: Inner Focus
inner_focus.desc: The Pokemon's focus prevents it from flinching. Also prevents Intimidate.

magma_armor.name: Magma Armor
magma_armor.desc: The Pokemon's magma armor prevents it from being frozen.

water_veil.name: Water Veil
water_veil.desc: The Pokemon's water veil prevents it from being burned.

rain_dish.name: Rain Dish
rain_dish.desc: The Pokemon gradually recovers HP in rain.

sand_stream.name: Sand Stream
sand_stream.desc: The Pokemon summons a sandstorm when it enters battle.

pressure.name: Pressure
pressure.desc: Puts pressure on the opposing Pokemon, causing it to use more PP.

thick_fat.name: Thick Fat
thick_fat.desc: Halves the damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

early_bird.name: Early Bird
early_bird.desc: The Pokemon awakens from sleep twice as fast.

flame_body.name: Flame Body
flame_body.desc: May burn an attacker that makes direct contact.

run_away.name: Run Away
run_away.desc: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokemon.

keen_eye.name: Keen Eye
keen_eye.desc: The Pokemon's keen eyes prevent its accuracy from being lowered.

hyper_cutter.name: Hyper Cutter
hyper_cutter.desc: The Pokemon's Attack stat cannot be lowered by other Pokemon.

pickup.name: Pickup
pickup.desc: The Pokemon may pick up items after battle.

truant.name: Truant
truant.desc: The Pokemon can only attack every other turn.

hustle.name: Hustle
hustle.desc: Boosts Attack by 50% but lowers accuracy of physical moves by 20%.

cute_charm.name: Cute Charm
cute_charm.desc: May infatuate an attacker that makes direct contact.

plus.name: Plus
plus.desc: Boosts Sp. Atk if an ally has Plus or Minus.

minus.name: Minus
minus.desc: Boosts Sp. Atk if an ally has Plus or Minus.

forecast.name: Forecast
forecast.desc: Changes Castform's type depending on the weather.

sticky_hold.name: Sticky Hold
sticky_hold.desc: Protects the Pokemon from item theft.

shed_skin.name: Shed Skin
shed_skin.desc: The Pokemon may heal its own status conditions at the end of each turn.

guts.name: Guts
guts.desc: Boosts Attack by 50% when the Pokemon has a status condition.

marvel_scale.name: Marvel Scale
marvel_scale.desc: Boosts Defense by 50% when the Pokemon has a status condition.

liquid_ooze.name: Liquid Ooze
liquid_ooze.desc: Damages attackers who try to drain HP from the Pokemon.

overgrow.name: Overgrow
overgrow.desc: Powers up Grass-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

blaze.name: Blaze
blaze.desc: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

torrent.name: Torrent
torrent.desc: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

swarm.name: Swarm
swarm.desc: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokemon's HP is low.

rock_head.name: Rock Head
rock_head.desc: Protects the Pokemon from recoil damage.

drought.name: Drought
drought.desc: The Pokemon summons harsh sunlight when it enters battle.

arena_trap.name: Arena Trap
arena_trap.desc: Prevents grounded opposing Pokemon from fleeing or switching out.

vital_spirit.name: Vital Spirit
vital_spirit.desc: The Pokemon's vital spirit prevents it from falling asleep.

white_smoke.name: White Smoke
white_smoke.desc: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering its stats.

shell_armor.name: Shell Armor
shell_armor.desc: A hard shell protects the Pokemon from critical hits.

air_lock.name: Air Lock
air_lock.desc: Eliminates the effects of all weather conditions.

tangled_feet.name: Tangled Feet
tangled_feet.desc: Raises evasion when the Pokemon is confused.

motor_drive.name: Motor Drive
motor_drive.desc: Boosts Speed if hit by an Electric-type move. Immune to Electric.

rivalry.name: Rivalry
rivalry.desc: Deals more damage to Pokemon of the same gender, less to opposite.

steadfast.name: Steadfast
steadfast.desc: Boosts Speed each time the Pokemon flinches.

snow_cloak.name: Snow Cloak
snow_cloak.desc: Boosts evasion in a hailstorm. Immune to hail damage.

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.desc: Causes the Pokemon to eat Berries at 50% HP instead of 25%.

anger_point.name: Anger Point
anger_point.desc: Maxes Attack when the Pokemon takes a critical hit.

unburden.name: Unburden
unburden.desc: Doubles Speed when the Pokemon uses or loses its held item.

heatproof.name: Heatproof
heatproof.desc: Halves damage from Fire-type moves and burn damage.

simple.name: Simple
simple.desc: Doubles the effect of stat changes on the Pokemon.

dry_skin.name: Dry Skin
dry_skin.desc: Recovers HP in rain, loses HP in sun. Absorbs Water moves, weak to Fire.

download.name: Download
download.desc: Raises Attack or Sp. Atk based on the opponent's lower defensive stat.

poison_heal.name: Poison Heal
poison_heal.desc: Restores HP when poisoned instead of taking damage.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.desc: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokemon (STAB becomes 2x).

skill_link.name: Skill Link
skill_link.desc: Maximizes the number of hits of multi-hit moves.

hydration.name: Hydration
hydration.desc: Heals status conditions in rain at end of turn.

solar_power.name: Solar Power
solar_power.desc: Boosts Sp. Atk in sun but loses HP each turn.

quick_feet.name: Quick Feet
quick_feet.desc: Boosts Speed when the Pokemon has a status condition.

normalize.name: Normalize
normalize.desc: All of the Pokemon's moves become Normal type and get a power boost.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.desc: Powers up critical hits even further (3x instead of 1.5x).

magic_guard.name: Magic Guard
magic_guard.desc: The Pokemon only takes damage from direct attacks.

no_guard.name: No Guard
no_guard.desc: All moves by and against this Pokemon always hit.

technician.name: Technician
technician.desc: Powers up weaker moves (base power 60 or less) by 50%.

leaf_guard.name: Leaf Guard
leaf_guard.desc: Prevents status conditions in harsh sunlight.

klutz.name: Klutz
klutz.desc: The Pokemon can't use any held items.

mold_breaker.name: Mold Breaker
mold_breaker.desc: Moves can be used on the target regardless of its abilities.

super_luck.name: Super Luck
super_luck.desc: Heightens the critical-hit ratio of moves.

aftermath.name: Aftermath
aftermath.desc: Damages the attacker if it knocks out the Pokemon with a contact move.

anticipation.name: Anticipation
anticipation.desc: Senses if the opponent has a super-effective or OHKO move.

forewarn.name: Forewarn
forewarn.desc: Reveals the opposing Pokemon's strongest move on switch-in.

unaware.name: Unaware
unaware.desc: Ignores the opposing Pokemon's stat changes when attacking or defending.

tinted_lens.name: Tinted Lens
tinted_lens.desc: Doubles the power of not-very-effective moves.

filter.name: Filter
filter.desc: Reduces the power of super-effective moves by 25%.

slow_start.name: Slow Start
slow_start.desc: Halves Attack and Speed for the first five turns in battle.

scrappy.name: Scrappy
scrappy.desc: Normal- and Fighting-type moves can hit Ghost types.

storm_drain.name: Storm Drain
storm_drain.desc: Draws Water-type moves and boosts Sp. Atk. Immune to Water.

ice_body.name: Ice Body
ice_body.desc: The Pokemon gradually recovers HP in hail. Immune to hail damage.

solid_rock.name: Solid Rock
solid_rock.desc: Reduces the power of super-effective moves by 25%.

snow_warning.name: Snow Warning
snow_warning.desc: The Pokemon summons a hailstorm when it enters battle.

honey_gather.name: Honey Gather
honey_gather.desc: The Pokemon may gather Honey after battle.

frisk.name: Frisk
frisk.desc: Reveals the opposing Pokemon's held item on switch-in.

multitype.name: Multitype
multitype.desc: Changes Arceus's type to match the held Plate or Z-Crystal.

flower_gift.name: Flower Gift
flower_gift.desc: Boosts Attack and Sp. Def of allies in harsh sunlight.

bad_dreams.name: Bad Dreams
bad_dreams.desc: Reduces the HP of sleeping opposing Pokemon each turn.

pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
pickpocket.desc: Steals the attacker's held item on contact.

sheer_force.name: Sheer Force
sheer_force.desc: Removes additional effects to increase move power by 30%.

contrary.name: Contrary
contrary.desc: Inverts all stat changes: raises become drops and vice versa.

unnerve.name: Unnerve
unnerve.desc: Prevents opposing Pokemon from eating Berries.

defiant.name: Defiant
defiant.desc: Sharply raises Attack when stats are lowered.

defeatist.name: Defeatist
defeatist.desc: Halves Attack and Sp. Atk when HP drops below half.

cursed_body.name: Cursed Body
cursed_body.desc: May disable a move used on the Pokemon.

healer.name: Healer
healer.desc: May heal an ally's status condition at end of turn.

friend_guard.name: Friend Guard
friend_guard.desc: Reduces damage dealt to allies by 25%.

weak_armor.name: Weak Armor
weak_armor.desc: Physical attacks lower Defense but sharply raise Speed.

multiscale.name: Multiscale
multiscale.desc: Reduces damage taken when HP is full by 50%.

toxic_boost.name: Toxic Boost
toxic_boost.desc: Increases the power of physical moves by 50% when poisoned.

flare_boost.name: Flare Boost
flare_boost.desc: Increases the power of special moves by 50% when burned.

harvest.name: Harvest
harvest.desc: May regrow a Berry after consuming one. Always works in sun.

telepathy.name: Telepathy
telepathy.desc: Anticipates an ally's attack and dodges it.

moody.name: Moody
moody.desc: Sharply raises one stat and lowers another at end of each turn.

overcoat.name: Overcoat
overcoat.desc: Protects from weather damage and powder/spore moves.

poison_touch.name: Poison Touch
poison_touch.desc: May poison a target when the Pokemon makes contact.

regenerator.name: Regenerator
regenerator.desc: Restores 1/3 of max HP when switching out.

big_pecks.name: Big Pecks
big_pecks.desc: Prevents the Pokemon's Defense from being lowered.

sand_rush.name: Sand Rush
sand_rush.desc: Doubles Speed in a sandstorm. Immune to sandstorm damage.

wonder_skin.name: Wonder Skin
wonder_skin.desc: Makes status moves more likely to miss against this Pokemon.

analytic.name: Analytic
analytic.desc: Boosts move power by 30% if the Pokemon moves last.

illusion.name: Illusion
illusion.desc: Enters battle disguised as the last Pokemon in the party.

imposter.name: Imposter
imposter.desc: Transforms into the opposing Pokemon on switch-in.

infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
infiltrator.desc: Passes through the opposing Pokemon's barriers and substitutes.

mummy.name: Mummy
mummy.desc: Contact with the Pokemon changes the attacker's ability to Mummy.

moxie.name: Moxie
moxie.desc: Boosts Attack after knocking out any Pokemon.

justified.name: Justified
justified.desc: Raises Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.

rattled.name: Rattled
rattled.desc: Boosts Speed when hit by Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type moves. Also from Intimidate.

magic_bounce.name: Magic Bounce
magic_bounce.desc: Reflects status moves back at the user.

sap_sipper.name: Sap Sipper
sap_sipper.desc: Absorbs Grass-type moves, raising Attack. Immune to Grass.

sand_force.name: Sand Force
sand_force.desc: Boosts Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves by 30% in sandstorm.

iron_barbs.name: Iron Barbs
iron_barbs.desc: Inflicts damage to the attacker on contact.

zen_mode.name: Zen Mode
zen_mode.desc: Changes Darmanitan's form when HP drops below half.

victory_star.name: Victory Star
victory_star.desc: Boosts the accuracy of all allies by 10%.

turboblaze.name: Turboblaze
turboblaze.desc: Moves can be used regardless of the target's abilities.

teravolt.name: Teravolt
teravolt.desc: Moves can be used regardless of the target's abilities.

aroma_veil.name: Aroma Veil
aroma_veil.desc: Protects the party from moves that limit move choices.

flower_veil.name: Flower Veil
flower_veil.desc: Protects Grass-type allies from stat drops and status.

cheek_pouch.name: Cheek Pouch
cheek_pouch.desc: Restores HP when eating a Berry.

protean.name: Protean
protean.desc: Changes the Pokemon's type to the type of the move it is about to use.

fur_coat.name: Fur Coat
fur_coat.desc: Halves the damage from physical moves.

magician.name: Magician
magician.desc: Steals the held item of a Pokemon it hits.

bulletproof.name: Bulletproof
bulletproof.desc: Protects the Pokemon from ball and bomb moves.

competitive.name: Competitive
competitive.desc: Sharply raises Sp. Atk when stats are lowered.

refrigerate.name: Refrigerate
refrigerate.desc: Normal-type moves become Ice-type and gain a 20% power boost.

sweet_veil.name: Sweet Veil
sweet_veil.desc: Prevents the Pokemon and its allies from falling asleep.

stance_change.name: Stance Change

gale_wings.name: Gale Wings
gale_wings.desc: Gives priority to Flying-type moves when HP is full.

mega_launcher.name: Mega Launcher
mega_launcher.desc: Powers up aura and pulse moves by 50%.

symbiosis.name: Symbiosis
symbiosis.desc: Passes its held item to an ally that uses one.

pixilate.name: Pixilate
pixilate.desc: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type and gain a 20% power boost.

gooey.name: Gooey
gooey.desc: Lowers the attacker's Speed when it makes contact.

aerilate.name: Aerilate
aerilate.desc: Normal-type moves become Flying-type and gain a 20% power boost.

parental_bond.name: Parental Bond
parental_bond.desc: The Pokemon attacks twice; the second hit deals 25% power.

dark_aura.name: Dark Aura
dark_aura.desc: Powers up all Dark-type moves on the field by 33%.

fairy_aura.name: Fairy Aura
fairy_aura.desc: Powers up all Fairy-type moves on the field by 33%.

aura_break.name: Aura Break
aura_break.desc: Reverses the effect of all aura abilities, reducing their power.

primordial_sea.name: Primordial Sea
primordial_sea.desc: Creates heavy rain that negates Fire-type attacks.

desolate_land.name: Desolate Land
desolate_land.desc: Creates extremely harsh sunlight that negates Water-type attacks.

delta_stream.name: Delta Stream
delta_stream.desc: Creates strong winds that weaken super-effective moves against Flying types.

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.desc: Raises Defense when hit by an attack.

wimp_out.name: Wimp Out
wimp_out.desc: The Pokemon switches out when its HP drops below half.

emergency_exit.name: Emergency Exit
emergency_exit.desc: The Pokemon switches out when its HP drops below half.

water_compaction.name: Water Compaction
water_compaction.desc: Sharply raises Defense when hit by a Water-type move.

merciless.name: Merciless
merciless.desc: Attacks always land critical hits on poisoned targets.

shields_down.name: Shields Down
shields_down.desc: Changes Minior's form when HP drops below half. Immune to status when shielded.

stakeout.name: Stakeout
stakeout.desc: Doubles damage dealt to a target that has just switched in.

water_bubble.name: Water Bubble
water_bubble.desc: Halves Fire damage taken, doubles Water moves, and prevents burns.

berserk.name: Berserk
berserk.desc: Boosts Sp. Atk when the Pokemon's HP drops below half.

slush_rush.name: Slush Rush
slush_rush.desc: Doubles Speed in hail or snow.

long_reach.name: Long Reach
long_reach.desc: The Pokemon uses its moves without making contact.

galvanize.name: Galvanize
galvanize.desc: Normal-type moves become Electric-type and gain a 20% power boost.

schooling.name: Schooling

disguise.name: Disguise
disguise.desc: Blocks one attack with its disguise, then the disguise breaks.

battle_bond.name: Battle Bond
battle_bond.desc: Transforms into Ash-Greninja after knocking out a Pokemon.

power_construct.name: Power Construct
power_construct.desc: Transforms into Complete Forme when HP drops below half.

corrosion.name: Corrosion
corrosion.desc: Can poison Steel- and Poison-type Pokemon.

comatose.name: Comatose
comatose.desc: The Pokemon is always drowsy, gaining sleep benefits but can still attack.

queenly_majesty.name: Queenly Majesty
queenly_majesty.desc: Prevents opposing Pokemon from using priority moves.

innards_out.name: Innards Out
innards_out.desc: Damages the attacker for the amount of HP lost when knocked out.

dancer.name: Dancer
dancer.desc: Copies any dance move used by another Pokemon.

battery.name: Battery
battery.desc: Powers up ally Pokemon's special moves by 30%.

fluffy.name: Fluffy
fluffy.desc: Halves contact move damage but doubles Fire-type damage taken.

dazzling.name: Dazzling
dazzling.desc: Prevents opposing Pokemon from using priority moves.

soul_heart.name: Soul-Heart
soul_heart.desc: Boosts Sp. Atk each time a Pokemon faints.

tangling_hair.name: Tangling Hair
tangling_hair.desc: Lowers the attacker's Speed when it makes contact.

receiver.name: Receiver
receiver.desc: Inherits the ability of a fallen ally.

power_of_alchemy.name: Power of Alchemy
power_of_alchemy.desc: Inherits the ability of a fallen ally.

beast_boost.name: Beast Boost
beast_boost.desc: Boosts the Pokemon's highest stat when it knocks out a Pokemon.

rks_system.name: RKS System
rks_system.desc: Changes Silvally's type to match its held Memory item.

electric_surge.name: Electric Surge
electric_surge.desc: Creates Electric Terrain when entering battle.

psychic_surge.name: Psychic Surge
psychic_surge.desc: Creates Psychic Terrain when entering battle.

misty_surge.name: Misty Surge
misty_surge.desc: Creates Misty Terrain when entering battle.

grassy_surge.name: Grassy Surge
grassy_surge.desc: Creates Grassy Terrain when entering battle.

full_metal_body.name: Full Metal Body
full_metal_body.desc: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering its stats.

shadow_shield.name: Shadow Shield
shadow_shield.desc: Reduces damage taken when HP is full by 50%.

prism_armor.name: Prism Armor
prism_armor.desc: Reduces the power of super-effective moves by 25%.

libero.name: Libero
libero.desc: Changes the Pokemon's type to the type of the move it is about to use.

ball_fetch.name: Ball Fetch
ball_fetch.desc: Retrieves the first Poke Ball that fails to catch a Pokemon.

cotton_down.name: Cotton Down
cotton_down.desc: Lowers the Speed of all other Pokemon when hit by an attack.

propeller_tail.name: Propeller Tail
propeller_tail.desc: Ignores the effects of moves and abilities that draw in moves.

mirror_armor.name: Mirror Armor
mirror_armor.desc: Bounces back stat-lowering effects to the opponent.

gulp_missile.name: Gulp Missile
gulp_missile.desc: Catches prey when using Surf or Dive, then spits it at attackers.

stalwart.name: Stalwart
stalwart.desc: Ignores the effects of moves and abilities that draw in moves.

steam_engine.name: Steam Engine
steam_engine.desc: Drastically boosts Speed when hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

punk_rock.name: Punk Rock
punk_rock.desc: Boosts sound-based moves by 30% and halves sound damage taken.

sand_spit.name: Sand Spit
sand_spit.desc: Summons a sandstorm when hit by an attack.

ice_scales.name: Ice Scales
ice_scales.desc: Halves the damage from special moves.

ice_face.name: Ice Face
ice_face.desc: Blocks one physical attack. The ice reforms in hail.

power_spot.name: Power Spot
power_spot.desc: Powers up ally Pokemon's moves by 30%.

mimicry.name: Mimicry
mimicry.desc: Changes the Pokemon's type based on the active terrain.

screen_cleaner.name: Screen Cleaner
screen_cleaner.desc: Removes Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil on entry.

steely_spirit.name: Steely Spirit
steely_spirit.desc: Powers up allies' Steel-type moves by 50%.

perish_body.name: Perish Body
perish_body.desc: Both Pokemon get a perish count when hit by a contact move.

wandering_spirit.name: Wandering Spirit
wandering_spirit.desc: Swaps abilities with the attacker on contact.

gorilla_tactics.name: Gorilla Tactics
gorilla_tactics.desc: Boosts Attack by 50% but can only use the first selected move.

neutralizing_gas.name: Neutralizing Gas
neutralizing_gas.desc: Suppresses the abilities of all other Pokemon while on the field.

pastel_veil.name: Pastel Veil
pastel_veil.desc: Prevents the Pokemon and its allies from being poisoned.

hunger_switch.name: Hunger Switch
hunger_switch.desc: Changes Morpeko's form each turn, altering Aura Wheel's type.

quick_draw.name: Quick Draw
quick_draw.desc: May enable the Pokemon to act first.

unseen_fist.name: Unseen Fist
unseen_fist.desc: Contact moves can bypass Protect and similar moves.

curious_medicine.name: Curious Medicine
curious_medicine.desc: Resets allies' stat changes when entering battle.

chilling_neigh.name: Chilling Neigh
chilling_neigh.desc: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokemon.

grim_neigh.name: Grim Neigh
grim_neigh.desc: Boosts Sp. Atk after knocking out a Pokemon.

lingering_aroma.name: Lingering Aroma

seed_sower.name: Seed Sower
seed_sower.desc: Grassy Terrain is set when the Pokemon is hit by an attack.

thermal_exchange.name: Thermal Exchange
thermal_exchange.desc: Boosts Attack when hit by a Fire-type move. Immune to burn.

anger_shell.name: Anger Shell

purifying_salt.name: Purifying Salt
purifying_salt.desc: Prevents status conditions. Halves Ghost-type damage.

well_baked_body.name: Well-Baked Body

wind_rider.name: Wind Rider
wind_rider.desc: Boosts Attack when hit by a wind move or Tailwind is active.

guard_dog.name: Guard Dog
guard_dog.desc: Boosts Attack from Intimidate instead of lowering it. Cannot be forced out.

wind_power.name: Wind Power
wind_power.desc: Becomes charged when hit by a wind move, boosting the next Electric move.

zero_to_hero.name: Zero to Hero

commander.name: Commander

electromorphosis.name: Electromorphosis
electromorphosis.desc: Becomes charged when hit by any attack, boosting the next Electric move.

protosynthesis.name: Protosynthesis
protosynthesis.desc: Boosts the highest stat in harsh sunlight or with Booster Energy.

quark_drive.name: Quark Drive
quark_drive.desc: Boosts the highest stat on Electric Terrain or with Booster Energy.

vessel_of_ruin.name: Vessel of Ruin
vessel_of_ruin.desc: Lowers the Sp. Atk of all other Pokemon.

sword_of_ruin.name: Sword of Ruin
sword_of_ruin.desc: Lowers the Defense of all other Pokemon.

tablets_of_ruin.name: Tablets of Ruin
tablets_of_ruin.desc: Lowers the Attack of all other Pokemon.

beads_of_ruin.name: Beads of Ruin
beads_of_ruin.desc: Lowers the Sp. Def of all other Pokemon.

orichalcum_pulse.name: Orichalcum Pulse
orichalcum_pulse.desc: Sets harsh sunlight and boosts Attack in sun.

hadron_engine.name: Hadron Engine
hadron_engine.desc: Sets Electric Terrain and boosts Sp. Atk on Electric Terrain.

opportunist.name: Opportunist
opportunist.desc: Copies any stat boosts the opponent gains.

cud_chew.name: Cud Chew
cud_chew.desc: Eats a Berry again at end of the next turn after first eating it.

supreme_overlord.name: Supreme Overlord
supreme_overlord.desc: Boosts Attack and Sp. Atk by 10% for each fainted party member.

costar.name: Costar
costar.desc: Copies ally's stat changes on entry.

toxic_debris.name: Toxic Debris
toxic_debris.desc: Scatters Toxic Spikes when hit by a physical move.

armor_tail.name: Armor Tail
armor_tail.desc: Prevents opposing Pokemon from using priority moves.

earth_eater.name: Earth Eater
earth_eater.desc: Recovers HP when hit by a Ground-type move. Immune to Ground.

mycelium_might.name: Mycelium Might
mycelium_might.desc: Status moves ignore abilities but always move last.

minds_eye.name: Mind's Eye
minds_eye.desc: Ignores evasion changes and can hit Ghost types with Normal/Fighting moves.

supersweet_syrup.name: Supersweet Syrup
supersweet_syrup.desc: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokemon when entering battle.

hospitality.name: Hospitality
hospitality.desc: Restores a small amount of an ally's HP when entering battle.

toxic_chain.name: Toxic Chain
toxic_chain.desc: May badly poison a target when the Pokemon attacks.

embody_aspect_wellspring.name: Embody Aspect (Wellspring Mask)
embody_aspect_wellspring.desc: Raises Sp. Def when entering battle.

tera_shift.name: Tera Shift
tera_shift.desc: Changes Terapagos to Terastal Form when entering battle.

tera_shell.name: Tera Shell
tera_shell.desc: All attacks are not very effective when HP is full.

teraform_zero.name: Teraform Zero
teraform_zero.desc: Eliminates all weather and terrain effects.

poison_puppeteer.name: Poison Puppeteer
poison_puppeteer.desc: Pecharunt's exclusive ability. Poisoned Pokemon also become confused.
